item.title: EU's MiCA transitional period expires July 1, requiring all crypto-asset service providers to hold a full EU license or cease operations.
Six U.S. agencies face a July 18 deadline to finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin rules; all major comment periods closed June 9.
FDIC and OCC propose stablecoin prudential rules under the GENIUS Act, including mandatory par-value redemption within two business days.
FinCEN and OFAC propose AML and sanctions compliance rules for payment stablecoin issuers, treating them as financial institutions.
SEC and CFTC jointly classify crypto assets into five categories: digital commodities, collectibles, tools, stablecoins, and securities.
Bank of England drops retail stablecoin holding limits and sets a GBP 40 billion aggregate issuance cap ahead of a 2027 market launch.
Kelp DAO's LayerZero bridge loses $292 million after North Korea's Lazarus Group compromises off-chain RPC infrastructure nodes.
Drift Protocol loses $285 million after North Korean hackers use a six-month social engineering campaign to gain admin key access.
North Korean hackers account for an estimated 76% of 2026 crypto losses; total DeFi theft exceeds $840 million through April.
OKX and NYSE form a joint venture to connect OKX's 120 million global users to ICE futures markets and tokenized NYSE equities.
BlackRock's IBIT Bitcoin ETF holds $70 billion in assets, representing approximately 59% of all U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF market share.
BlackRock files an updated S-1 for an iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF, expanding its digital asset product suite.
MoneyGram becomes a Solana network validator as it expands stablecoin-based international money transfer operations.
U.S. Congress considers the CLARITY Act, which would assign the CFTC primary jurisdiction over digital commodity spot markets.
